title: Question: Running verilator continuosly
body:
---


Author Name: **Jakob Eriksson**
Original Redmine Message: 200 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Hello!

I am new to Verilator.  I wonder, is it possible to

1) Run verilator without letting it exit? (Until killing it.)
2) Connect an output or input to some kind of signalling mechanism in Linux? (Or a socket.) I am planning on using it to map binary inputs/outputs to the parallell port (or similar) on a PC, thus using the PC as a kind of "gigantic FPGA".

What do you think?

regards,
Jakob
